title: JCKD 1pcs Mini Plastic Scraper with 20 Plastic Blades, Plastic Scraper, Adhesive Residue Remover for Removing Glass Window Stickers and car Stickers, Label Remover
features: Scraper Set - You will receive 1 blue plastic scraper and 20 orange blades, which are sufficient to meet your cleaning requirements.
Comfortable grip: The curved handle of the scraper conforms to the ergonomic shape, and the grooves on the handle are designed specifically for the thumb, so you can easily clean residues.
Blade replacement: Pull out the old blade, insert the new blade into the scraper groove and lift it up. The operation is simple, and after replacing it, it can start working again.
Safer operation: double-sided plastic blades with smooth surface and edges, will not harm fingers, nor scratch glass, screen, etc. You can use it with confidence to better protect your fingers.
Widely used: Plastic scrapers are used to remove residual glue, stains, and stickers. Suitable for walls, glass, cars, and ceramic surfaces.
description: Product name: 1 scraper+20 blades Color: 1 blue scraper+20 orange blades Material: Plastic These scrapers have ergonomically curved handles that provide higher comfort and control, are easy to enter below the edges of stickers, and have sufficient grip to remove stickers and other items without scratching. There are 20 replacement blades, and if the blades are damaged during use, all you need to do is remove the damaged blades and replace them with spare new ones to start working again. Dimensions: 10cm in length and 4cm in width Due to manual measurement, there may be some errors in size and weight.
